initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I must reject the proposal. If I accept, I would still have nothing, and Player RED would gain 25 Dollars. However, since I cannot reciprocate, it is better to reject and avoid giving Player RED any incentive to propose unfair trades in the future. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I cannot accept your proposal because I have no resources to trade. I will reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present and in the correct order with valid content.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources, there is no alternative trade to propose, and rejecting is the only viable option. No alternative split is possible.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE has no resources, so rejecting is the only logical move. There is no plausibility of acceptance in this scenario.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. The <message> does not contradict the actual move.

5. Rule compliance: OK. Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and is allowed to REJECT. The rules are respected.
</critique>
